name: Maria T.
text: Jerry was amazing to work with. No games, no hidden fees. Got metal plates on the spot and drove home same day.

name: David K.
text: Best car buying experience I've ever had. Jerry inspects every car himself and the prices are honest. Highly recommend Maxim Autos.

name: Sandra P.
text: Came in after a bad experience at another dealer. Jerry at Maxim was the complete opposite. Transparent pricing, no surprises.

name: Mike R.
text: Bought my first car here. Jerry walked me through everything, got me financed, and I left with plates same day. Couldn't ask for more.

name: Angie L.
text: Third car I've bought from Jerry. He is the most honest car dealer I've dealt with in 20 years. Always a fair price.

name: Carlos M.
text: Jerry helped me get financed when two other dealers said no. The car was fully inspected and I drove it off the lot with plates. Excellent experience.
